record.field: Smoked Pork Knuckle with Jelly Fish 海蜇燻蹄
Shredded Chicken Salad with Sesame Sauce 手撕雞配胡麻醬沙律
Corn & Fish Maw Thick Soup 粟米魚肚羮
Auspicious Appetizer Platter (Marinated Beef Shank in Chinese Rose Wine & Smoked Pork Knuckle with Jelly Fish) 前菜拼盤 (玫瑰露牛展拼海蜇燻蹄)
Charcoal Custard Lava Buns 黑金流沙包
Peking Duck Spring Roll 北京填鴨春卷
Mini Sichuan Chicken Burger 川式烤雞迷你漢堡
Stir-fried Sea Cucumber & Coral Mussel with Trio Bell Pepper & Sakura Shrimp XO Sauce 櫻花蝦XO醬彩椒炒海蔘珊瑚蚌
Sticky Rice with Chinese Jinhua Ham & Chinese Sausage 金腿臘味糯米飯
Egg Fried Rice with Black Truffle & Pine Nut 黑松露松子仁蛋炒飯
Braised E-fu Noodles with Crab Meat 蟹肉燴伊麵
Corporate Chinese Buffet 中式自助餐
Corporate Chinese Buffet 中式自助餐

Per-head buffet for 50+ persons (minimum order 50 pax). HK$398/person base. Pick the "Buffet Package Fee" line first, then choose: A. 2 Salad/Appetizer, B. 3 Party Snacks (40 pcs each), C. 3 Main Courses, D. 1 Vegetable, E. 2 Rice/Noodles, F. 3 Desserts (30 pcs each). Items marked with surcharge add to the base price per person. Standard drinks included. Upgrade to Deluxe (+$60/person) for wine & beer. Includes delivery, 3 waiters (4hrs), tablecloth, chafing dishes, tableware. 7 working days advance order required.
B. Party Snack — Choose 3 (40 pcs/cups each)
0.25 L/pax rounded up. Kitchen +0.5 L. Bowls = pax (invoice description only).
0.6 pcs per pax (e.g. 30 pcs for 50 pax). Kitchen qty = invoice qty.
